## Type

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `node --check` passes on changed files
- [ ] Kept the **0-dependency** ethos (no new runtime deps without discussion)
- [ ] For MCP/CLI: token-efficient (compact perception, not raw HTML/screenshots)
- [ ] Tested the affected surface (CLI / MCP handshake / `LOGICA_PILOT_UITEST=1` / smoke)
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
